question: Where does everything live?
title: Repository details
summary: The map—only after you understand why. Technical depth lives in the edition; collective memory lives in .vibekb/.

scenes.headline: You understand the why. Here is the where.
scenes.body: This chapter is intentionally last. Files matter after intent. The edition engine holds module-level depth; this guide holds the reasoning you need before opening either.

scenes.label: Repository layout
scenes.description: Two presentation engines, one knowledge root.

layers.title: .vibekb/
layers.detail: project.json, decisions/, sessions/, timeline/, handoff/, guide/ chapters. Source of truth—not the website.

layers.title: guide/
layers.detail: PHP + jQuery presentation of guide JSON. What you are reading now.

layers.title: edition/
layers.detail: Deeper module articles for when you need implementation detail.

layers.title: Application code
layers.detail: SaaS Idea Manager itself—the artifact the knowledge describes.

entries.question: I need to add a field to ideas

points.title: Then
points.text: Migration, write path, read path, forms—in one change set

points.title: Update
points.text: Guide chapter 6 and relevant module in edition

points.title: Start
points.text: Chapter 4 feature reasoning—does it pass the one-operator test?

points.title: Capture
points.text: feature-timeline/ entry and session summary when shipped

points.title: Remember
points.text: SQLite file is persistent on host; not rsynced from repo

points.title: Check
points.text: debugging/blank-ideas-list.md if list empty after deploy

scenes.headline: Initialize VibeKB on day one of your next project.
scenes.body: This sample is what six months of AI-assisted building looks like when understanding keeps pace with generation. The code is ordinary. The habit is not.

facts.label: You just walked through
facts.text: Overview → timeline → architecture → features → decisions → developer notes → AI context → repository.

facts.label: Imagine
facts.text: Every repository you build with Cursor starting like this.
